title: The Smell of Rain - Petrichor Depth

spore_eml1.description: Geosmin released from bacterial spores by raindrops: EML-1 aerosol dispersal
spore_eml1.reason: Petrichor dispersal is EML-1: exponential aerosol spread from impact sites

nostalgia_emlinf.description: Emotional experience of rain smell: memory trigger; possibly EML-inf

nostalgia_classifier.description: Nostalgia is a depth classifier: EML-1 chemistry -> EML-2 detection -> EML-inf meaning
